message:
fix(abi): getaddrinfo/getnameinfo IPv4 endianness, confstr CS_PATH

Bug #20: getaddrinfo returned reversed IP addresses (1.0.0.127 instead of
127.0.0.1). The sockaddr_in.sin_addr.s_addr field must contain the IPv4
address in network byte order, which means the raw octets [127,0,0,1]
must appear in that order in memory. Use u32::from_ne_bytes(octets) to
achieve this on both LE and BE platforms.

Bug #21: getnameinfo read s_addr with from_be() which double-converted
the address. Fixed to use to_ne_bytes() to read raw memory bytes.

Bug #22: confstr(CS_PATH) returned "/usr/bin" instead of "/bin:/usr/bin".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
